The '''Ruby-throated kete''' was a [[Species/Legends|species]] of avians that were native to the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Bellassa/Legends|Bellassa]]. They possessed pale faces and red throats, as did [[Kestrel]] when he grew angry, a similarity observed by [[Trever Flume]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Last of the Jedi: Against the Empire]]'' {{1stm}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
